text:
Created attachment 244671
Patch for freecad

Follow Porters Handbooks recommendation and due to recent announcement from GitHub we should use official archives to avoid breakage.

Poudriere testport OK 13.2-RELEASE (amd64)

Reference:
https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#makefile-master_sites-github (see warning entry)
